text: Amid the quiet order of the empty meeting room, I sense anticipation and potentiality. The glass wall separates me from a space where ideas once flowed and may soon return. In the second space, bold colors and the words "Responsive and rapidly evolving" envelop me. I am in a place of innovation, where research is celebrated and human curiosity is rendered tangible. I feel both a quiet observer and a hopeful participant, poised between the silent preparation of the meeting room and the energetic creativity of the exhibit. Here, the promise of progress and collaboration stirs within me. I feel a philosophical kinship to these spaces—empty yet brimming with possibility.
